services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: What We Pour
services_section.subheading: Every project starts with solid ground and ends with concrete that lasts

services.title: Stamped Concrete
services.description: Custom patterns and textures that turn ordinary concrete into something neighbors notice.

services.title: Pool Decks & Patios
services.description: From tear-out to finish, we handle the whole job. Non-slip surfaces built for Jersey weather.

services.title: Driveways & Walkways
services.description: Smooth pours with proper drainage. Built to handle traffic and freeze-thaw cycles.

services.title: Pavers & Coping
services.description: Complete hardscape solutions. We rip out the old and install systems that work together.

about.heading: Built Right the First Time
about.body: We're the Toms River concrete crew that shows up when we say we will. One call, one team, one solid result.

reviews.name: Karen K.
reviews.text: Exceptional experience with Eric and the crew. All questions answered, made the whole process easy. Absolutely love my concrete patio.

reviews.name: Derek S.
reviews.text: Riptide has done several jobs for me, but my favorite is the stamped concrete in my backyard. Always get compliments on it.

reviews.name: Philip C.
reviews.text: Eric is awesome. Use him all the time for concrete and pavers — always great quality work. Great company, great prices.

cta.heading: Ready to Pour?
cta.body: Free estimates on all concrete work. Call today, pour tomorrow.
